title: The Inference Engine
author: Zachary Proser
description: A worked guide to LLM inference memory, KV-cache paging, continuous batching, prefill, decode, quantization, and latency-capacity planning.

blueprint.subject: SERVING
blueprint.eyebrow: Memory ledger · Scheduling trace · Complete working drawing
blueprint.subtitle: A request becomes tokens only after the engine fits weights, activations, and growing KV state inside a schedule with explicit latency costs.
rfiSuggestions: Why is my p95 latency fine but p99 terrible?
How much VRAM do I actually need for N concurrent users?
When does quantization stop being free?
